name: Agora Conversational AI API
description: Agora Conversational AI RESTful API for managing AI-powered conversational agents. Enables starting, stopping, querying, updating, and controlling AI agents that join Agora RTC channels for real-time voice conversations using ASR, LLM, and TTS pipelines.
